chains.display_name: ANSI Roller Chain Family — Sprocket Compatibility Reference
chains.description: Master sprocket compatibility reference for ANSI B29.1 roller chain family (#25 through #240). Documents tooth counts, bore styles, materials, and split sprocket availability across all major ANSI chain sizes and manufacturers. Use for RFQ and procurement guidance.

80.notes: Most complete sprocket catalog — all styles stocked

hardened_steel.description: Extended tooth life in abrasive environments

nylon_mc.description: Low noise, light duty, no lube

split.notes: Available #40–#120 cast iron or steel. Field installation without shaft removal.

source_refs.notes: Martin Sprocket — most complete ANSI catalog

chains.display_name: Donghua Chain Group Product Catalogue 2020 — Full Reference
chains.description: Master reference record for the Donghua Chain Group Product Catalogue 2020. Contains full dimensional tables, material specifications, application notes, and sprocket data for over 12,000 chain varieties. Source document for all Donghua entries in this normalized catalog.

specs.publisher: Hangzhou Donghua Chain Group Co., Ltd.

source_refs.notes: Full catalog download. Source of truth for all DH entries.

chains.description: Connecting link for BS/ISO 08B roller chain. Spring clip type. Standard joining link for 1/2" BS chain.
Connecting link for ANSI 100 roller chain. Spring clip or cotter pin type. For chains requiring field joining.
Connecting link for ANSI 120 roller chain. Cotter pin type standard at this pitch for security.
Connecting link for BS/ISO 16B roller chain. Cotter pin type standard at this pitch.
Connecting link for ANSI 40 roller chain — spring clip (open) type. Donghua catalog confirmed. Standard assembly/disassembly joining link.

performance_tiers.notes: Connecting link — not for cyclic loading beyond 40% of chain working load.

chains.description: Connecting link for ANSI 60 roller chain — spring clip type. Standard joining link.
Connecting link for ANSI 80 roller chain. Spring clip or cotter pin type available.
Offset link (half link) for ANSI 40 chain — allows odd-number chain lengths. Use sparingly as offset links reduce chain strength.

performance_tiers.notes: Offset link — approx 75% of chain tensile strength. Use sparingly.

chains.description: Offset link (half link) for ANSI 60 chain. Allows odd-number chain lengths. Approx 75% of chain tensile.
Offset link for ANSI 80 chain. Allows odd-number chain lengths. Reduced tensile — use only where necessary.

chains.display_name: ANSI Standard Sprockets — Donghua Catalog Reference
chains.description: Donghua sprocket catalog reference for ANSI B29.1 standard roller chain sprockets. Covers chains #25 through #240, single to quadruple strand. Available in plain bore, keyway, QD bushing, taper lock, and split configurations.

bore_styles.description: Plain bore — customer machines to size
Keyway with setscrew — standard bore + keyway
Quick Detach bushing mount — JA/SK/SH/SF bushing sizes
Split sprocket — for in-place installation without shaft removal
Shear pin hub — overload protection — Needs Review

materials.description: Standard cast iron — most economical, good wear
Carbon steel — higher strength than CI, machineable
Induction hardened sprocket teeth for extended life

sprocket_compatibility.split_sprocket_notes: Split sprockets allow in-place installation — no shaft removal needed. Available for ANSI 40–120. Extra cost but saves downtime.

source_refs.notes: Donghua ANSI sprocket catalog — pp.281–320. Full tooth/bore/material matrix.

chains.description: Engineering class 81X/81XH/81XHH bushed chain sprockets. Donghua catalog section pp.290–296. Available in split configurations for field installation. Rexnord/Link-Belt interchangeable.

sprocket_compatibility.notes: Split sprockets strongly recommended for cement/mining installations. 5-tooth minimum for slow-speed high-load applications.

source_refs.notes: Rexnord 81X sprockets are interchangeable with Donghua

chains.description: WR78/WD78/WR110/WR124 welded drag chain sprockets. Donghua catalog pp.293–297. Cast iron or steel, split construction available for drag conveyor installation without shaft removal.

sprocket_compatibility.notes: Split sprockets available for most WR/WD sizes. Hardened tooth tips extend life in abrasive environments.
